entropy_detector.diagnosis: ENTROPY_THRESHOLD_DEAD: entropy range (1.86-2.39) never exceeds 2.40, so CHAOTIC never votes. Falls in middle band 84.7% of time.

volatility_detector.diagnosis: VOLATILITY_THRESHOLD_DEAD: volatility range (0.37-1.05) never exceeds 0.90 by enough, stays in middle band 91.9% of time.

stability_detector.diagnosis: STABILITY_THRESHOLD_DEAD: stability value is constant at 0.500 (due to _calc_state_features bug: using first expert top6 predictions instead of actual aggregated predictions). Never drops below p20.

regime_detector.diagnosis: REGIME_THRESHOLD_DEAD: regime_shift condition (|first_half_hits - second_half_hits| > 3) never triggers in the data.

root_causes.cause: stability is calculated using first expert's top6 predictions (from prediction_history) but the check `if actual in pred.get(list(EXPERTS)[0], [])` is wrong - should use actual aggregated top6
window=20 puts entropy in middle band (2.05-2.40) 84.7% of time. Need larger window to detect chaotic regimes (entropy>2.40).
regime_shift condition too strict: |first_half - second_half| > 3 never triggers.

recommendation: Need to fix: (1) stability calculation to use actual predictions, (2) entropy window to 30-50, (3) regime threshold relaxation, (4) middle-band handling for entropy/volatility
